title: rhodiola chrysanthemifolia subsp. liciae
intro: Rhodiola chrysanthemifolia subsp. liciae is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Crassulaceae. This plant, native to the mountains of Turkey, is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The medicinal properties of Rhodiola chrysanthemifolia subsp. liciae include its ability to reduce stress, improve mental clarity, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, ultimately providing health benefits such as improved mood and reduced fatigue. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and supplements, allowing for various forms of consumption.
